quote: I'm a 60 something bowler that Rob helped with the knowledge and skills of the game. He was very patient with me and kind, and just a great person to be around. My game has improved by 20 pins with his help.
author: Nick

quote: So much I could say. Coach Rob helped Dakota, Andrew, and now Caiden and all 3 of them have remembered everything they have taught them. Caiden has come a long way with just the stuff Coach Rob has shown him. Thanks for being an awesome coach.
author: Kara

quote: I'm a 4 year bowler that Coach Rob has helped with me to be better at game and improve. I have learned a lot from him through the four years of high school. From taking his advice it made me a better bowler today. I appreciate Coach Rob very much. Thank you.
author: Hunter
